title: ACF Question IR
description: The structured decomposition of a data question: which metric, sliced how, filtered how, over what window. Shared contract — the eval seed's `ir:` block and the disambiguator/router's production output are the same object. The filter item shape is intentionally identical to metric.schema.json's expression.mandatory_filters.

metric.description: Name reference into domains/<domain>/metrics.yaml (the seed's `domain` scopes the lookup).

time_window.description: Relative token (last_quarter, last_30_days, ytd, all_time, ...) for evergreen seeds; absolute {start, end} only where expected.as_of pins the snapshot.
